query: WITH days AS ( SELECT generate_series( (CURRENT_DATE - make_interval(days => $1))::date, CURRENT_DATE, '1 day'::interval )::date AS date ) SELECT d.date AS "date!", COALESCE(SUM(latest.original_size), 0)::INT8 AS "original_size!", COALESCE(SUM(latest.compressed_size), 0)::INT8 AS "compressed_size!", NULLIF(COALESCE(SUM(latest.repo_unique_csize), 0), 0)::INT8 AS "deduplicated_size?" FROM days d LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (br.repo_id) br.original_size, br.compressed_size, br.repo_unique_csize FROM backup_reports br WHERE br.started_at::date <= d.date AND br.status = 'success' ORDER BY br.repo_id, br.started_at DESC ) latest ON true GROUP BY d.date ORDER BY d.date
